title: Section 32 tax points for special supplies

captions.text: Most sales use the transaction date as the VAT tax point.
Enter the transaction as usual: customer, date, description, amount.
Some supplies follow the special timing rules in section 32 of the VAT Act.
The panel lists the four scenarios with their statutory citations.
Continuous supply: tax point = billing period end or payment date, whichever is earlier.
The computed tax point is shown before anything is saved.
Advance payment: the tax point becomes the date payment was received.
Save, and the transaction carries its section 32 tax point into the correct period.
